classification_rules.rule: Set dataSourceMode to uploaded_file when a workbook is attached and the requested outcome concerns that workbook; otherwise use existing_db for canonical PMO reporting.
Use inspect_file only for workbook structure, sheet, column, or type inspection.
Use review_staging for mapping, normalization, or staged-row review without a canonical DB diff.
Use validate when the requested outcome emphasizes readiness, data quality, missing references, parse errors, or duplicates.
Use preview_changes when the user asks what canonical DB rows would be inserted, updated, skipped, or overwritten without publishing.
Use publish only when the user explicitly asks to import, publish, apply, sync, or update canonical PMO data.
Use generate_report when the user asks for idle, overbook, utilization, or PMO reporting without requesting publication.

For rebalance-only questions such as 'who can take workload', 'recommend rebalance', or 'suggest allocation transfer', keep the request read-only on existing_db and route chat to pmo_recommendRebalance rather than creating a publish workflow.
Use pmo_generateReport/generate_report for report or PDF requests; use pmo_recommendRebalance for candidate suggestions when no report artifact is requested.
Use publish_then_report only when the user explicitly requests both publication and report generation.
Choose the narrowest actionMode satisfying the explicit requested outcome. Never add canonical writes implicitly.
Extract dates and report types only when explicitly present. Never invent dates.
